note: Web wallet RPC help panel: stronger wording so a casual visitor cannot mistake 127.0.0.1 for the SOST server. New red call-out box at the top of the ? panel says 'Read this first: 127.0.0.1 is not the SOST server, it always means this exact computer.' The 127.0.0.1 row now opens with 'Only use this if YOU run sost-node on this computer' and explicitly states that 18232 is the full RPC port (nothing to append). The /rpc/public and /rpc rows got short LOCAL NODE / WEBSITE READ ONLY / WEBSITE AUTH sub-labels under the URL so the column scans visually at a glance. Force-reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
